news.t: When 'everything else is hitting the fan,' these ETFs look to help

overview.description: The Cambria Global Momentum ETF (GMOM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively-managed fund that selects approximately 17 ETFs, across various asset classes, based on price momentum. The fund aims for capital appreciation rather than income. GMOM was launched on Nov 4, 2014 and is issued by Cambria.

data.title: When 'everything else is hitting the fan,' these ETFs look to help
data.text: When markets plummet, don't fear momentum. Trend following, when coupled with technical analysis, can be an effective way to employ ETFs.

data.title: You need some real asset exposure in your portfolio, says Cambria's Meb Faber
data.text: Meb Faber, Cambria Investments CIO, joins 'Halftime Report' to discuss his global momentum ETF.
